---
title: "Explorateur de Prédictions COICOP"
subtitle: "Analyse interactive des résultats du classifieur — BDF INSEE"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    scrolling: true
    nav-buttons: []
lang: fr
---

# {.sidebar}

```{ojs}
//| output: false
db = DuckDBClient.of({})
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
PALETTE = ({
  levels: ["#0d6efd", "#198754", "#ffc107", "#dc3545"],
  severity: {
    "correct":    "#198754",
    "near-miss":  "#8bc34a",
    "L3 faux":    "#ffc107",
    "L2 faux":    "#ff9800",
    "far-miss":   "#dc3545"
  },
  neutral: "#6c757d"
})
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
fmt_n = d3.format(",")
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
fmt_pct = d3.format(".1f")
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
fmt_conf = d3.format(".3f")
```

```{ojs}
// --- CONNEXION ---
html`<h5 style="margin:0 0 .5rem; color:#0d6efd">📁 Fichier de prédictions</h5>`

viewof predictions_url = Inputs.text({
  label: "URL HTTPS ou S3 (parquet)",
  placeholder: "https://…/predictions.parquet",
  value: ""
})

viewof load_btn = Inputs.button("⟳ Charger les données", {
  value: 0,
  reduce: (v) => v + 1
})
```

```{ojs}
// Indicateur de statut
{
  load_btn; // dépendance réactive
  if (!predictions_url?.trim()) {
    return html`<span style="color:#6c757d; font-size:.85em">⬤ En attente d'une URL</span>`
  }
  if (data_ready?.status === "loading") {
    return html`<span style="color:#ffc107; font-size:.85em">⬤ Chargement…</span>`
  }
  if (data_ready?.status === "error") {
    return html`<span style="color:#dc3545; font-size:.85em">⬤ Erreur : ${data_ready.message?.slice(0,80)}</span>`
  }
  if (data_ready?.status === "ok") {
    return html`<span style="color:#198754; font-size:.85em">⬤ ${fmt_n(data_ready.n)} observations chargées</span>`
  }
  return html`<span style="color:#6c757d; font-size:.85em">⬤ Inactif</span>`
}
```

```{ojs}
html`<hr style="margin:.75rem 0">`
html`<h6 style="color:#495057">🔍 Filtres globaux</h6>`

viewof global_exclude_tech = Inputs.toggle({
  label: "Exclure codes 98/99 (techniques)",
  value: true
})

viewof global_source = Inputs.select(
  available_sources,
  { label: "Source", value: "Toutes" }
)

viewof global_year = Inputs.select(
  available_years,
  { label: "Année", value: "Toutes" }
)

viewof global_conf_min = Inputs.range([0, 1], {
  label: "Confiance minimale",
  step: 0.05,
  value: 0
})
```

# Vue d'ensemble

```{ojs}
// =============================================================
// CHARGEMENT DES DONNÉES + VUE PRINCIPALE
// =============================================================

data_ready = {
  load_btn;
  if (!predictions_url?.trim()) return { status: "empty" };

  const url = predictions_url.trim();

  try {
    // Télécharger le fichier via fetch pour éviter que DuckDB
    // n'interprète l'URL comme un chemin S3/Amazon
    const resp = await fetch(url);
    if (!resp.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${resp.status} — ${resp.statusText}`);
    const buf = new Uint8Array(await resp.arrayBuffer());

    // Enregistrer le buffer comme fichier local dans DuckDB WASM
    await db.db().registerFileBuffer("predictions.parquet", buf);

    // Création de la vue enrichie avec tous les champs dérivés
    await db.query(`
      CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW preds AS
      WITH base AS (
        SELECT * FROM read_parquet('predictions.parquet')
      ),
      leveled AS (
        SELECT *,
          lpad(split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 1), 2, '0')
            AS true_level1,
          CASE WHEN len(string_split(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.')) >= 2
            THEN lpad(split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 1), 2, '0')
                 || '.' || split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 2)
            ELSE NULL END AS true_level2,
          CASE WHEN len(string_split(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.')) >= 3
            THEN lpad(split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 1), 2, '0')
                 || '.' || split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 2)
                 || '.' || split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 3)
            ELSE NULL END AS true_level3,
          CASE WHEN len(string_split(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.')) >= 4
            THEN lpad(split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 1), 2, '0')
                 || '.' || split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 2)
                 || '.' || split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 3)
                 || '.' || split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 4)
            ELSE NULL END AS true_level4,
          lpad(split_part(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.', 1), 2, '0')
            IN ('98', '99') AS is_technical,
          len(string_split(CAST(code AS VARCHAR), '.')) AS code_depth,
          TRY_CAST(confidence AS DOUBLE) AS confidence_num,
          TRY_CAST(budget AS DOUBLE) AS budget_num,
          TRY_CAST(annee AS INTEGER) AS annee_int,
          len(COALESCE(l_pr_product, '')) AS text_len
        FROM base
      ),
      with_errors AS (
        SELECT *,
          (true_level1 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level1 IS NOT NULL
           AND true_level1 <> predicted_level1) AS err_l1,
          (true_level2 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level2 IS NOT NULL
           AND true_level2 <> predicted_level2) AS err_l2,
          (true_level3 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level3 IS NOT NULL
           AND true_level3 <> predicted_level3) AS err_l3,
          (true_level4 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level4 IS NOT NULL
           AND true_level4 <> predicted_level4) AS err_l4,
          CASE
            WHEN true_level4 IS NULL OR predicted_level4 IS NULL THEN NULL
            WHEN true_level1 IS NOT NULL
             AND true_level1 <> predicted_level1 THEN 'far-miss'
            WHEN true_level2 IS NOT NULL
             AND true_level2 <> predicted_level2 THEN 'L2 faux'
            WHEN true_level3 IS NOT NULL
             AND true_level3 <> predicted_level3 THEN 'L3 faux'
            WHEN true_level4 <> predicted_level4 THEN 'near-miss'
            ELSE 'correct'
          END AS error_severity,
          CASE
            WHEN TRY_CAST(budget AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 0 AND 2    THEN '0-2 €'
            WHEN TRY_CAST(budget AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 2 AND 5    THEN '2-5 €'
            WHEN TRY_CAST(budget AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 5 AND 10   THEN '5-10 €'
            WHEN TRY_CAST(budget AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 10 AND 20  THEN '10-20 €'
            WHEN TRY_CAST(budget AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 20 AND 50  THEN '20-50 €'
            WHEN TRY_CAST(budget AS DOUBLE) BETWEEN 50 AND 100 THEN '50-100 €'
            WHEN TRY_CAST(budget AS DOUBLE) > 100              THEN '100 €+'
            ELSE NULL
          END AS budget_tranche
        FROM leveled
      )
      SELECT * FROM with_errors
    `);

    // Détecter les colonnes top-k disponibles
    const cols = await db.query(`
      SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns
      WHERE table_name = 'preds'
        AND column_name LIKE 'predicted_level4_top%'
      ORDER BY column_name
    `);
    const topk_available = cols.map(c => c.column_name);

    const test = await db.query("SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM preds");
    return { status: "ok", n: Number(test[0].n), topk_cols: topk_available };
  } catch(e) {
    return { status: "error", message: e.message };
  }
}

// Options des filtres dynamiques (se peuplent après chargement)
available_sources = {
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return ["Toutes"];
  const rows = await db.query(`
    SELECT DISTINCT source FROM preds WHERE source IS NOT NULL ORDER BY source
  `);
  return ["Toutes", ...rows.map(r => r.source)];
}

available_years = {
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return ["Toutes"];
  const rows = await db.query(`
    SELECT DISTINCT annee_int FROM preds WHERE annee_int IS NOT NULL ORDER BY annee_int
  `);
  return ["Toutes", ...rows.map(r => String(r.annee_int))];
}

available_shop_types = {
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return ["Tous"];
  const rows = await db.query(`
    SELECT DISTINCT shop_type_name FROM preds
    WHERE shop_type_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY shop_type_name
  `);
  return ["Tous", ...rows.map(r => r.shop_type_name)];
}

// Construction du WHERE clause global réutilisé dans toutes les pages
global_where = {
  const parts = ["1=1"];
  if (global_exclude_tech) parts.push("NOT is_technical");
  if (global_source !== "Toutes") parts.push(`source = '${global_source.replace(/'/g,"''")}'`);
  if (global_year !== "Toutes") parts.push(`annee_int = ${global_year}`);
  if (global_conf_min > 0) parts.push(`confidence_num >= ${global_conf_min}`);
  return parts.join(" AND ");
}
```

## Row {height="140px"}

```{ojs}
// --- Métriques globales (cartes de valeur) ---
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") {
    return html`<div class="text-muted p-3">Chargez un fichier pour voir les métriques.</div>`
  }

  const stats = await db.query(`
    SELECT
      COUNT(*) AS n_total,
      SUM(CASE WHEN is_technical THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS n_tech,
      AVG(CASE WHEN NOT is_technical AND true_level1 IS NOT NULL
               AND predicted_level1 IS NOT NULL
               AND true_level1 = predicted_level1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS acc_l1,
      AVG(CASE WHEN NOT is_technical AND true_level4 IS NOT NULL
               AND predicted_level4 IS NOT NULL
               AND true_level4 = predicted_level4 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS acc_l4,
      AVG(CASE WHEN NOT is_technical THEN confidence_num END) AS mean_conf
    FROM preds
    WHERE ${global_where}
  `);
  const s = stats[0];

  const card = (val, lbl, color, icon) => html`
    <div class="card text-bg-${color} h-100">
      <div class="card-body text-center py-2">
        <div style="font-size:1.6em; font-weight:700; line-height:1.1">${val}</div>
        <div style="font-size:.8em; opacity:.9">${icon} ${lbl}</div>
      </div>
    </div>`;

  return html`<div class="row g-2 h-100">
    <div class="col">${card(fmt_n(s.n_total), "Observations", "primary", "📦")}</div>
    <div class="col">${card(fmt_pct(s.n_tech / s.n_total * 100) + "%", "Codes 98/99", "secondary", "⚠️")}</div>
    <div class="col">${card(fmt_pct(s.acc_l1) + "%", "Accuracy Niveau 1", s.acc_l1 >= 90 ? "success" : s.acc_l1 >= 70 ? "warning" : "danger", "🎯")}</div>
    <div class="col">${card(fmt_pct(s.acc_l4) + "%", "Accuracy Niveau 4", s.acc_l4 >= 80 ? "success" : s.acc_l4 >= 60 ? "warning" : "danger", "🎯")}</div>
    <div class="col">${card(fmt_conf(s.mean_conf ?? 0), "Confiance moyenne", "info", "📊")}</div>
  </div>`;
}
```

## Row

### Accuracy par niveau {width="45%"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p class="text-muted">…</p>`

  const rows = [];
  for (const lvl of [1,2,3,4]) {
    const r = await db.query(`
      SELECT
        ${lvl} AS niveau,
        COUNT(*) AS n,
        AVG(CASE WHEN true_level${lvl} = predicted_level${lvl} THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS accuracy,
        COUNT(DISTINCT true_level${lvl}) AS n_classes
      FROM preds
      WHERE ${global_where}
        AND true_level${lvl} IS NOT NULL
        AND predicted_level${lvl} IS NOT NULL
    `);
    if (r.length) rows.push(r[0]);
  }

  return html`
    <table class="table table-sm table-striped" style="font-size:.9em">
      <thead><tr>
        <th>Niveau</th><th class="text-end">N obs.</th>
        <th class="text-end">Classes</th><th class="text-end">Accuracy</th>
        <th style="width:120px">Barre</th>
      </tr></thead>
      <tbody>
      ${rows.map(r => {
        const acc = Number(r.accuracy ?? 0);
        const color = acc >= 85 ? "#198754" : acc >= 65 ? "#ffc107" : "#dc3545";
        return html`<tr>
          <td><strong>Niveau ${r.niveau}</strong></td>
          <td class="text-end">${fmt_n(r.n)}</td>
          <td class="text-end">${r.n_classes}</td>
          <td class="text-end"><strong style="color:${color}">${fmt_pct(acc)}%</strong></td>
          <td>
            <div style="background:#e9ecef; border-radius:3px; height:12px; overflow:hidden">
              <div style="width:${acc}%; background:${color}; height:100%"></div>
            </div>
          </td>
        </tr>`;
      })}
      </tbody>
    </table>`;
}
```

### Top-k accuracy (niveau 4) {width="55%"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p class="text-muted">…</p>`

  // Construire les conditions top-k disponibles
  const topk_cols = data_ready?.topk_cols ?? [];
  const topk_data = [];

  for (let k = 1; k <= 10; k++) {
    const candidates = ["predicted_level4"];
    for (let r = 2; r <= k; r++) {
      const col = `predicted_level4_top${r}`;
      if (topk_cols.includes(col)) candidates.push(col);
    }
    const in_clause = candidates.map(c => `CAST(${c} AS VARCHAR)`).join(", ");
    const res = await db.query(`
      SELECT ${k} AS k,
        AVG(CASE WHEN CAST(true_level4 AS VARCHAR) IN (${in_clause}) THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS accuracy
      FROM preds
      WHERE ${global_where} AND true_level4 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level4 IS NOT NULL
    `);
    topk_data.push({ k, accuracy: Number(res[0]?.accuracy ?? 0), available: candidates.length });
  }

  return Plot.plot({
    height: 240,
    marginLeft: 50,
    x: { label: "k (top-k)", tickFormat: d => `${d}` },
    y: { label: "Accuracy (%)", domain: [0, 100] },
    marks: [
      Plot.line(topk_data, {
        x: "k", y: "accuracy",
        stroke: "#0d6efd", strokeWidth: 2.5
      }),
      Plot.dot(topk_data, {
        x: "k", y: "accuracy",
        fill: d => d.available > 1 ? "#0d6efd" : "#adb5bd",
        r: 5,
        tip: true,
        title: d => `Top-${d.k} : ${fmt_pct(d.accuracy)}%`
      }),
      Plot.text(topk_data.filter(d => [1,3,5,10].includes(d.k)), {
        x: "k", y: "accuracy",
        text: d => `${fmt_pct(d.accuracy)}%`,
        dy: -12, fontSize: 11, fill: "#0d6efd"
      })
    ]
  });
}
```

## Row

### Distribution des scores de confiance {width="50%"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p class="text-muted">…</p>`

  const bins = await db.query(`
    SELECT
      ROUND(confidence_num * 20) / 20 AS conf_bin,
      COUNT(*) AS n,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level4 = predicted_level4 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS acc
    FROM preds
    WHERE ${global_where} AND confidence_num IS NOT NULL AND true_level4 IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
  `);

  return Plot.plot({
    height: 220,
    marginLeft: 50,
    x: { label: "Score de confiance", domain: [0, 1] },
    y: { label: "Nombre d'observations" },
    color: { legend: true },
    marks: [
      Plot.rectY(bins, {
        x1: d => d.conf_bin - 0.025,
        x2: d => d.conf_bin + 0.025,
        y: "n",
        fill: d => d.acc >= 0.9 ? "#198754" : d.acc >= 0.7 ? "#ffc107" : "#dc3545",
        tip: true,
        title: d => `Confiance ≈ ${fmt_pct(d.conf_bin * 100)}%\nN = ${fmt_n(d.n)}\nAccuracy = ${fmt_pct(d.acc * 100)}%`
      })
    ]
  });
}
```

### Couverture vs Accuracy par seuil {width="50%"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p class="text-muted">…</p>`

  const tdata = await db.query(`
    WITH base AS (
      SELECT confidence_num AS c,
             (true_level4 = predicted_level4)::INT AS correct
      FROM preds
      WHERE ${global_where}
        AND true_level4 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level4 IS NOT NULL
    ),
    thresholds AS (
      SELECT unnest(generate_series(0, 20)) / 20.0 AS seuil
    )
    SELECT
      t.seuil,
      AVG(CASE WHEN b.c >= t.seuil THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) AS couverture,
      COALESCE(
        AVG(CASE WHEN b.c >= t.seuil THEN b.correct::DOUBLE ELSE NULL END),
        0
      ) AS accuracy
    FROM base b CROSS JOIN thresholds t
    GROUP BY t.seuil
    ORDER BY t.seuil
  `);

  return Plot.plot({
    height: 220,
    marginLeft: 50,
    x: { label: "Seuil de confiance", domain: [0, 1] },
    y: { label: "(%)", domain: [0, 100] },
    color: { legend: true, domain: ["Couverture", "Accuracy"], range: ["#ff9800", "#0d6efd"] },
    marks: [
      Plot.line(tdata, { x: "seuil", y: d => d.couverture * 100, stroke: "#ff9800", strokeWidth: 2 }),
      Plot.line(tdata, { x: "seuil", y: d => d.accuracy * 100, stroke: "#0d6efd", strokeWidth: 2 }),
      Plot.tip(tdata, Plot.pointerX({
        x: "seuil",
        title: d => `Seuil: ${fmt_pct(d.seuil * 100)}%\nCouverture: ${fmt_pct(d.couverture * 100)}%\nAccuracy: ${fmt_pct(d.accuracy * 100)}%`
      }))
    ]
  });
}
```

# Analyse par Critères

## Row {height="60px"}

```{ojs}
html`<div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-3 flex-wrap">`

viewof analysis_dim = Inputs.select(
  ["source", "annee", "shop_type_name", "budget_tranche"],
  {
    label: "Dimension d'analyse",
    format: d => ({ source: "Source de données", annee: "Année", shop_type_name: "Type de magasin", budget_tranche: "Tranche de budget" })[d]
  }
)

html`</div>`
```

## Row

### Accuracy par dimension et niveau {width="60%"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p class="text-muted">Chargez un fichier.</p>`

  const dim = analysis_dim;
  const rows = await db.query(`
    SELECT
      COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') AS dim_val,
      COUNT(*) AS n_total,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level1 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level1 IS NOT NULL
               AND true_level1 = predicted_level1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS acc_l1,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level2 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level2 IS NOT NULL
               AND true_level2 = predicted_level2 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS acc_l2,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level3 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level3 IS NOT NULL
               AND true_level3 = predicted_level3 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS acc_l3,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level4 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level4 IS NOT NULL
               AND true_level4 = predicted_level4 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS acc_l4
    FROM preds
    WHERE ${global_where}
    GROUP BY 1
    ORDER BY n_total DESC
    LIMIT 20
  `);

  // Préparer les données pour le graphique en barres groupées
  const plot_data = rows.flatMap(r => [1,2,3,4].map(lvl => ({
    dim_val: r.dim_val.length > 25 ? r.dim_val.slice(0,23) + "…" : r.dim_val,
    niveau: `N${lvl}`,
    accuracy: Number(r[`acc_l${lvl}`] ?? 0)
  })));

  return Plot.plot({
    height: Math.max(300, rows.length * 28 + 60),
    marginLeft: Math.min(200, Math.max(...rows.map(r => r.dim_val.length)) * 7 + 10),
    marginRight: 60,
    x: { label: "Accuracy (%)", domain: [0, 100] },
    color: { legend: true, domain: ["N1","N2","N3","N4"], range: PALETTE.levels },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(plot_data, {
        y: "dim_val",
        x: "accuracy",
        fill: "niveau",
        tip: true,
        title: d => `${d.dim_val} — ${d.niveau}\n${fmt_pct(d.accuracy)}%`
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ]
  });
}
```

### Volume et confiance {width="40%"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p class="text-muted">…</p>`

  const dim = analysis_dim;
  const rows = await db.query(`
    SELECT
      COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') AS dim_val,
      COUNT(*) AS n,
      AVG(confidence_num) AS mean_conf
    FROM preds
    WHERE ${global_where}
    GROUP BY 1
    ORDER BY n DESC
    LIMIT 20
  `);

  const vol_chart = Plot.plot({
    height: 200,
    marginLeft: Math.min(180, Math.max(...rows.map(r => r.dim_val.length)) * 7 + 10),
    x: { label: "Observations" },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(rows, {
        y: d => d.dim_val.length > 22 ? d.dim_val.slice(0,20) + "…" : d.dim_val,
        x: "n",
        fill: "#0d6efd",
        sort: { y: "-x" },
        tip: true,
        title: d => `${d.dim_val}\nN = ${fmt_n(d.n)}`
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ]
  });

  const conf_chart = Plot.plot({
    height: 200,
    marginLeft: Math.min(180, Math.max(...rows.map(r => r.dim_val.length)) * 7 + 10),
    x: { label: "Confiance moyenne", domain: [0, 1] },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(rows, {
        y: d => d.dim_val.length > 22 ? d.dim_val.slice(0,20) + "…" : d.dim_val,
        x: "mean_conf",
        fill: "#198754",
        sort: { y: "-x" },
        tip: true,
        title: d => `${d.dim_val}\nConfiance moy. = ${fmt_conf(d.mean_conf)}`
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ]
  });

  return html`${vol_chart}${conf_chart}`;
}
```

## Row {.tabset}

### Heatmap accuracy × Niveau

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p class="text-muted">…</p>`

  const dim = analysis_dim;
  const heat_data = await db.query(`
    WITH top_vals AS (
      SELECT COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') AS dim_val, COUNT(*) AS n
      FROM preds WHERE ${global_where}
      GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 15
    )
    SELECT
      COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') AS dim_val,
      1 AS niveau,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level1 = predicted_level1 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100 AS accuracy,
      COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM preds JOIN top_vals ON COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') = top_vals.dim_val
    WHERE ${global_where} AND true_level1 IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A'), 2,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level2 = predicted_level2 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100,
      COUNT(*)
    FROM preds JOIN top_vals ON COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') = top_vals.dim_val
    WHERE ${global_where} AND true_level2 IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A'), 3,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level3 = predicted_level3 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100,
      COUNT(*)
    FROM preds JOIN top_vals ON COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') = top_vals.dim_val
    WHERE ${global_where} AND true_level3 IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    UNION ALL
    SELECT COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A'), 4,
      AVG(CASE WHEN true_level4 = predicted_level4 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100,
      COUNT(*)
    FROM preds JOIN top_vals ON COALESCE(CAST(${dim} AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') = top_vals.dim_val
    WHERE ${global_where} AND true_level4 IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1, 2
    ORDER BY 1, 2
  `);

  return Plot.plot({
    height: Math.max(250, heat_data.filter(d => d.niveau === 1).length * 28 + 60),
    marginLeft: 180,
    marginRight: 40,
    color: {
      type: "linear", domain: [0, 100],
      range: ["#dc3545", "#ffc107", "#198754"],
      legend: true, label: "Accuracy (%)"
    },
    marks: [
      Plot.cell(heat_data, {
        x: d => `Niveau ${d.niveau}`,
        y: d => d.dim_val.length > 25 ? d.dim_val.slice(0,23) + "…" : d.dim_val,
        fill: "accuracy",
        tip: true,
        title: d => `${d.dim_val} — Niveau ${d.niveau}\nAccuracy: ${fmt_pct(d.accuracy)}%\nN = ${fmt_n(d.n)}`
      }),
      Plot.text(heat_data, {
        x: d => `Niveau ${d.niveau}`,
        y: d => d.dim_val.length > 25 ? d.dim_val.slice(0,23) + "…" : d.dim_val,
        text: d => `${fmt_pct(d.accuracy)}`,
        fill: d => d.accuracy > 55 ? "white" : "#212529",
        fontSize: 11, fontWeight: "600"
      })
    ]
  });
}
```

# Explorateur d'Erreurs

## Row {height="120px"}

```{ojs}
html`<div class="row g-2">`

viewof err_search_text = Inputs.text({
  label: "🔍 Libellé produit",
  placeholder: "ex: jambon, yaourt…",
  value: ""
})

viewof err_true_code = Inputs.text({
  label: "Code vrai (préfixe)",
  placeholder: "ex: 01, 01.1",
  value: ""
})

viewof err_pred_code = Inputs.text({
  label: "Code prédit (préfixe)",
  placeholder: "ex: 02, 03.1",
  value: ""
})

viewof err_source = Inputs.select(
  available_sources,
  { label: "Source", value: "Toutes" }
)

viewof err_year = Inputs.select(
  available_years,
  { label: "Année", value: "Toutes" }
)

viewof err_shop_type = Inputs.select(
  available_shop_types,
  { label: "Type magasin", value: "Tous" }
)

viewof err_conf_min = Inputs.range([0, 1], {
  label: "Confiance min",
  step: 0.05,
  value: 0
})

viewof err_conf_max = Inputs.range([0, 1], {
  label: "Confiance max",
  step: 0.05,
  value: 1
})

viewof err_severity = Inputs.select(
  ["Tout", "Erreurs seulement", "Correct seulement", "near-miss", "L2 faux", "L3 faux", "far-miss"],
  { label: "Type d'erreur" }
)

html`</div>`
```

## Row {height="100px"}

```{ojs}
// Stats résumé du filtre
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p class="text-muted">…</p>`

  const { where_clause } = error_filter_state;

  const stats = await db.query(`
    SELECT
      COUNT(*) AS n_total,
      SUM(CASE WHEN err_l4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS n_errors,
      AVG(confidence_num) AS mean_conf,
      COUNT(DISTINCT true_level4) AS n_codes
    FROM preds
    WHERE ${where_clause} AND true_level4 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level4 IS NOT NULL
  `);
  const s = stats[0];
  const err_rate = s.n_total > 0 ? s.n_errors / s.n_total : 0;

  const card = (val, lbl, color) => html`
    <div class="card border-${color} h-100">
      <div class="card-body py-1 text-center">
        <div style="font-size:1.4em; font-weight:700; color:var(--bs-${color})">${val}</div>
        <small class="text-muted">${lbl}</small>
      </div>
    </div>`;

  return html`<div class="row g-2 h-100">
    <div class="col-sm-3">${card(fmt_n(s.n_total), "Résultats filtrés", "primary")}</div>
    <div class="col-sm-3">${card(fmt_n(s.n_errors), "Erreurs niveau 4", "danger")}</div>
    <div class="col-sm-3">${card(fmt_pct(err_rate * 100) + "%", "Taux d'erreur L4", err_rate < 0.1 ? "success" : err_rate < 0.25 ? "warning" : "danger")}</div>
    <div class="col-sm-3">${card(s.n_codes, "Codes distincts", "secondary")}</div>
  </div>`;
}
```

## Row

### Résultats {width="65%"}

```{ojs}
// Construction dynamique du WHERE clause pour les erreurs
error_filter_state = {
  const parts = ["true_level4 IS NOT NULL", "predicted_level4 IS NOT NULL"];

  if (global_exclude_tech) parts.push("NOT is_technical");

  if (err_search_text?.trim())
    parts.push(`LOWER(l_pr_product) LIKE '%${err_search_text.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/'/g,"''")}%'`);

  if (err_true_code?.trim())
    parts.push(`(true_level4 LIKE '${err_true_code.trim().replace(/'/g,"''")}%' OR true_level1 LIKE '${err_true_code.trim().replace(/'/g,"''")}%')`);

  if (err_pred_code?.trim())
    parts.push(`(predicted_level4 LIKE '${err_pred_code.trim().replace(/'/g,"''")}%')`);

  if (err_source !== "Toutes")
    parts.push(`source = '${err_source.replace(/'/g,"''")}'`);

  if (err_year !== "Toutes")
    parts.push(`annee_int = ${err_year}`);

  if (err_shop_type !== "Tous")
    parts.push(`shop_type_name = '${err_shop_type.replace(/'/g,"''")}'`);

  parts.push(`confidence_num >= ${err_conf_min} AND confidence_num <= ${err_conf_max}`);

  switch (err_severity) {
    case "Erreurs seulement":    parts.push("err_l4 = true"); break;
    case "Correct seulement":   parts.push("error_severity = 'correct'"); break;
    case "near-miss":            parts.push("error_severity = 'near-miss'"); break;
    case "L2 faux":              parts.push("error_severity = 'L2 faux'"); break;
    case "L3 faux":              parts.push("error_severity = 'L3 faux'"); break;
    case "far-miss":             parts.push("error_severity = 'far-miss'"); break;
  }

  return { where_clause: parts.join(" AND ") };
}
```

```{ojs}
// Table des résultats
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok")
    return html`<p class="text-muted">Chargez un fichier pour explorer les erreurs.</p>`

  const { where_clause } = error_filter_state;

  const rows = await db.query(`
    SELECT
      l_pr_product                        AS "Produit",
      CAST(code AS VARCHAR)               AS "Code vrai",
      CAST(true_level4 AS VARCHAR)        AS "Niveau 4 vrai",
      CAST(predicted_level4 AS VARCHAR)   AS "Niveau 4 prédit",
      ROUND(confidence_num * 100, 1)      AS "Confiance %",
      error_severity                      AS "Sévérité",
      COALESCE(source, '')                AS "Source",
      COALESCE(CAST(annee_int AS VARCHAR), '') AS "Année",
      COALESCE(shop_type_name, '')        AS "Type magasin",
      COALESCE(CAST(ROUND(budget_num, 2) AS VARCHAR), '') AS "Budget €"
    FROM preds
    WHERE ${where_clause}
    ORDER BY confidence_num DESC
    LIMIT 500
  `);

  if (rows.length === 0)
    return html`<p class="text-muted text-center mt-3">Aucun résultat pour ces critères.</p>`;

  // Coloration des lignes selon sévérité
  const severity_color = {
    "correct":   "#d1e7dd",
    "near-miss": "#d3f9d8",
    "L3 faux":   "#fff3cd",
    "L2 faux":   "#ffe0b2",
    "far-miss":  "#f8d7da",
  };

  const table_html = html`
    <div style="max-height:450px; overflow-y:auto; font-size:.82em">
      <table class="table table-sm table-hover">
        <thead class="sticky-top bg-white">
          <tr>
            <th>Produit</th><th>Code vrai</th>
            <th>Prédit L4</th><th>Conf %</th>
            <th>Sévérité</th><th>Source</th><th>Année</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          ${rows.map(r => html`
            <tr style="background:${severity_color[r["Sévérité"]] || 'white'}">
              <td style="max-width:200px; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap"
                  title="${r["Produit"]}">${r["Produit"]}</td>
              <td><code>${r["Code vrai"]}</code></td>
              <td><code style="color:${r["Sévérité"] === 'correct' ? '#198754' : '#dc3545'}">${r["Niveau 4 prédit"]}</code></td>
              <td>${r["Confiance %"]}</td>
              <td><span style="font-size:.8em">${r["Sévérité"] ?? '–'}</span></td>
              <td>${r["Source"]}</td>
              <td>${r["Année"]}</td>
            </tr>`
          )}
        </tbody>
      </table>
      ${rows.length === 500 ? html`<p class="text-muted text-center" style="font-size:.8em">⚠ Affichage limité à 500 résultats. Affinez vos filtres pour voir plus.</p>` : ''}
    </div>`;

  // Bouton export CSV
  const export_btn = html`<button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary mb-2">⬇ Exporter CSV (${rows.length} lignes)</button>`;
  export_btn.onclick = () => {
    const header = Object.keys(rows[0]).join(",");
    const lines = rows.map(r => Object.values(r).map(v =>
      typeof v === "string" && (v.includes(",") || v.includes('"'))
        ? `"${v.replace(/"/g, '""')}"` : v
    ).join(","));
    const csv = [header, ...lines].join("\n");
    const blob = new Blob(["\uFEFF" + csv], { type: "text/csv;charset=utf-8" });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement("a");
    a.href = url; a.download = "erreurs_coicop.csv"; a.click();
  };

  return html`${export_btn}${table_html}`;
}
```

### Top confusions & sévérité {width="35%"}

```{ojs}
{
  if (data_ready?.status !== "ok") return html`<p class="text-muted">…</p>`

  const { where_clause } = error_filter_state;

  // Paires de confusion
  const pairs = await db.query(`
    SELECT
      true_level4 || ' → ' || predicted_level4 AS paire,
      COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM preds
    WHERE ${where_clause} AND err_l4 = true
    GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 15
  `);

  const confusion_chart = pairs.length === 0
    ? html`<p class="text-muted small">Aucune erreur avec ces filtres.</p>`
    : Plot.plot({
        height: 220,
        marginLeft: 160,
        x: { label: "Nombre d'erreurs" },
        marks: [
          Plot.barX(pairs.slice().reverse(), {
            y: "paire",
            x: "n",
            fill: "#dc3545",
            tip: true,
            title: d => `${d.paire}\n${d.n} erreurs`
          }),
          Plot.ruleX([0])
        ]
      });

  // Répartition sévérité
  const sev_data = await db.query(`
    SELECT
      COALESCE(error_severity, 'N/A') AS severity,
      COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM preds
    WHERE ${where_clause} AND true_level4 IS NOT NULL AND predicted_level4 IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY n DESC
  `);

  const sev_chart = Plot.plot({
    height: 160,
    marginLeft: 120,
    x: { label: "Observations" },
    color: {
      domain: Object.keys(PALETTE.severity),
      range: Object.values(PALETTE.severity)
    },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(sev_data, {
        y: "severity",
        x: "n",
        fill: "severity",
        tip: true,
        title: d => `${d.severity}: ${fmt_n(d.n)}`
      }),
      Plot.ruleX([0])
    ]
  });

  return html`
    <h6 class="mb-1" style="font-size:.85em">Top confusions (L4)</h6>
    ${confusion_chart}
    <h6 class="mt-2 mb-1" style="font-size:.85em">Répartition par sévérité</h6>
    ${sev_chart}`;
}
```

# Informations Modèle

## Row {height="80px"}

```{ojs}
html`<div class="alert alert-info py-2" style="font-size:.9em">
  Inspectez les métadonnées d'un modèle directement dans le navigateur via <strong>Pyodide</strong> (Python WASM).
  Fournissez l'URL HTTPS du répertoire du modèle sur S3 — le fichier <code>*_metadata.pkl</code> sera
  téléchargé et désérialisé côté client, sans serveur.
</div>`

viewof model_url = Inputs.text({
  label: "URL du répertoire modèle (HTTPS/S3)",
  placeholder: "https://minio.example.com/bucket/models/basic_model",
  value: ""
})

viewof inspect_model_btn = Inputs.button("🔍 Inspecter le modèle", {
  value: 0,
  reduce: v => v + 1
})
```

```{ojs}
// Statut Pyodide
{
  if (!inspect_model_btn) return html`<span></span>`;
  if (!pyodide_instance && inspect_model_btn)
    return html`<span style="color:#ffc107; font-size:.85em">⏳ Chargement de Pyodide (~20 Mo, mis en cache ensuite)…</span>`;
  if (pyodide_instance)
    return html`<span style="color:#198754; font-size:.85em">⬤ Pyodide prêt</span>`;
}
```

## Row

### Métadonnées du modèle {width="55%"}

```{ojs}
// Chargement paresseux de Pyodide (uniquement au clic)
pyodide_instance = {
  inspect_model_btn;
  if (!inspect_model_btn) return null;
  const { loadPyodide } = await import("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/pyodide/v0.26.4/full/pyodide.mjs");
  return await loadPyodide();
}

// Fetch du .pkl et unpickle via Pyodide
model_metadata = {
  if (!pyodide_instance || !model_url?.trim()) return null;

  const base = model_url.trim().replace(/\/$/, "");
  const candidates = [
    "basic_metadata.pkl",
    "hierarchical_metadata.pkl",
    "multihead_metadata.pkl"
  ];

  try {
    for (const name of candidates) {
      let resp;
      try { resp = await fetch(`${base}/${name}`); } catch { continue; }
      if (!resp.ok) continue;

      const bytes = new Uint8Array(await resp.arrayBuffer());
      pyodide_instance.globals.set("pkl_bytes", pyodide_instance.toPy(bytes));

      const result = pyodide_instance.runPython(`
import pickle
data = pickle.loads(bytes(pkl_bytes))
safe = {}
for k, v in data.items():
    if isinstance(v, (str, int, float, bool, type(None))):
        safe[k] = v
    elif isinstance(v, (list, tuple)):
        safe[f"{k}_count"] = len(v)
        if len(v) <= 30:
            safe[k] = [str(x) for x in v]
    elif isinstance(v, dict):
        safe[f"{k}_count"] = len(v)
        safe[f"{k}_sample"] = [str(x) for x in list(v.keys())[:20]]
safe
      `);

      return {
        metadata_file: name,
        model_url: base,
        metadata: result.toJs({ dict_converter: Object.fromEntries })
      };
    }
    return { error: `Aucun fichier *_metadata.pkl trouvé à ${base}` };
  } catch(e) {
    return { error: `Erreur Pyodide : ${e.message}` };
  }
}
```

```{ojs}
{
  if (!inspect_model_btn)
    return html`<p class="text-muted">Renseignez l'URL du modèle et cliquez sur Inspecter.</p>`;

  if (!model_metadata)
    return html`<p class="text-muted">Chargement en cours…</p>`;

  if (model_metadata.error)
    return html`<div class="alert alert-danger py-2">${model_metadata.error}</div>`;

  const meta = model_metadata.metadata ?? {};
  const scalar_rows = Object.entries(meta).filter(([k]) =>
    !k.endsWith("_sample") && !k.endsWith("_count") || k === "label2id_count"
  );

  return html`
    <h6>📦 ${model_metadata.metadata_file}</h6>
    <p class="text-muted small">URL : <code>${model_metadata.model_url}</code></p>
    <table class="table table-sm table-bordered" style="font-size:.85em">
      <thead><tr><th>Paramètre</th><th>Valeur</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        ${scalar_rows.map(([k, v]) => html`
          <tr>
            <td><code>${k}</code></td>
            <td>${Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(", ") : String(v ?? "–")}</td>
          </tr>`)}
      </tbody>
    </table>`;
}
```

### Codes COICOP connus & serveur API {width="45%"}

```{ojs}
{
  // Codes connus (depuis l'inspection Pyodide)
  let codes_html = html``;
  if (model_metadata?.metadata) {
    const m = model_metadata.metadata;
    const sample = m.label2id_sample || m.id2label_sample
      || Object.entries(m).find(([k]) => k.endsWith("_sample"))?.[1]
      || [];
    const count = m.label2id_count || m.id2label_count || null;
    if (sample.length > 0) {
      codes_html = html`
        <h6 style="font-size:.85em">
          Codes COICOP connus${count ? html` <span class="badge bg-secondary">${count}</span>` : ""}
        </h6>
        <div style="font-size:.8em; max-height:280px; overflow-y:auto; line-height:1.8">
          ${sample.map(c => html`<code class="me-1 mb-1" style="display:inline-block">${c}</code>`)}
          ${count && count > sample.length ? html`<span class="text-muted">… et ${count - sample.length} autres</span>` : ""}
        </div>`;
    }
  } else if (inspect_model_btn) {
    codes_html = html`<p class="text-muted small">Inspectez un modèle pour voir ses codes.</p>`;
  }

  // Health check optionnel du serveur API
  let api_html = html``;
  try {
    const resp = await fetch("http://localhost:8000/health");
    if (resp.ok) {
      const h = await resp.json();
      api_html = html`
        <div class="alert alert-success py-2 mt-3" style="font-size:.85em">
          ✅ Serveur API en ligne — modèle ${h.model_loaded ? "chargé" : "non chargé"}
          <br><small>Chemin : <code>${h.model_path}</code></small>
        </div>`;
    }
  } catch {
    api_html = html`
      <div class="alert alert-secondary py-2 mt-3" style="font-size:.82em">
        ⬤ Serveur API non détecté sur <code>localhost:8000</code>
        <details class="mt-1">
          <summary style="cursor:pointer">Comment le démarrer</summary>
          <pre style="font-size:.78em; background:#f8f9fa; padding:.5rem; border-radius:4px; margin-top:.3rem"><code>uv run python main.py serve \\
  --model checkpoints/basic/basic_model \\
  --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000</code></pre>
        </details>
      </div>`;
  }

  return html`${codes_html}${api_html}`;
}
```
